name: Rahul Mehta
bio: Specializing in hyper-realism and portrait tattoos with 8+ years of experience. Featured in Mumbai Ink Festival 2024.
quote: Quantum's color consistency is unmatched. Once I switched, I never looked back.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Award-winning neo-traditional artist known for intricate floral and botanical designs. 6 years tattooing.
quote: The Gold Label inks are everything. My florals have never looked so alive.

name: Arjun Kapoor
bio: Black and grey specialist with a passion for Japanese and blackwork. Over 10 years in the industry.
quote: The gray wash set is my daily driver. Quantum just gets it right.

name: Sneha Kulkarni
bio: Mandala and geometric specialist creating sacred geometry tattoos. Known for precision and clean linework.
quote: Lining Black is the only black I use. The flow is absolutely perfect.

name: Vikram Singh
bio: Watercolor and abstract artist based in the beach capital. Tattoos over 400 tourists and locals yearly.
quote: My watercolor pieces pop so much more with Quantum's pigment load.

name: Ananya Das
bio: Traditional and tribal specialist drawing inspiration from Bengali folk art and cultural heritage.
quote: These inks respect the skin. My clients heal faster and the colors stay true.

name: Rohan Iyer
bio: Color realism and pop art specialist. Known for vibrant, detailed pieces that look like paintings.
quote: Electric Blue and Crimson Red are straight fire. My clients can't believe the vibrancy.

name: Meera Joshi
bio: Fine line and minimalist artist creating delicate, elegant tattoos with razor-sharp precision.
quote: For fine line work, the Lining Black's consistency is just unreal. It never bleeds.
